meaning: n.流氓,无赖,坏蛋,淘气鬼adj.不诚实的,卑鄙的,下贱的
examples: He was a rascal from his birth.
What's that old rascal been telling you?
An arrogant rascal, he has fired clients, including Unilever, when marketing executives disagreed with him.
Best festival dance act went to The Prodigy and Dizzee Rascal was awarded best urban act.
